TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Ka tou wæ'ï ka tatouro ni-akoumea ki ouvavât-toug-han ki paka kyttil-len tou Kana ka tou Galilæa: ka anna-un hynna Rarenan ti Jesus.
Ka tou wæ'ï ka tatouro ni-akoumea ki ouvavât-toug-han ki paka kyttil-len tou Kana ka tou Galilæa: ka anna-un hynna Rarenan ti Jesus.
S.TRANS: Ende op den derden dagh was daer een Bruyloft te Cana in Galileen : ende de moeder Jesu was aldaer.
And the third day there was a marriage in Cana of Galilee; and the mother of Jesus was there:
第三日，在加利利的迦拿有娶親的筵席，耶穌的母親在那裏。

S.FORM: Ka na pæ-tætætæ-em-appa ta ti Jesus lam-appa ki Pæhtæ-tæutæu-en tyn pa-ou-qua tou vâttouh ki pa-kakyttyl-lan.
Ka na pæ-tætætæ-em-appa ta ti Jesus lam-appa ki Pæhtæ-tæutæu-en tyn pa-ou-qua tou vâttouh ki pa-kakyttyl-lan.
S.TRANS: Ende Jesus was oock ghenoodt ende sijne Discipulen tot Bruyloft.
And both Jesus was called, and his disciples, to the marriage.
耶穌和他的門徒也被請去赴席。

S.FORM: Irou ka aulough ta halà ki karæummættæh, ni-k'ma ta Ra-reen'nan ti Jesus tyni-æn; Ä'oussi-ato ta neni ki hala ki karæummæ-tæh.
Irou ka aulough ta halà ki karæummættæh, ni-k'ma ta Ra-reen'nan ti Jesus tyni-æn; Ä'oussi-ato ta neni ki hala ki karæummæ-tæh.
S.TRANS: Ende als er wijn gebrach sende de moeder Jesu tot hem Sy en hebben genen wijn
And when they wanted wine, the mother of Jesus saith unto him, They have no wine.
酒用盡了，耶穌的母親對他說：「他們沒有酒了。」

S.FORM: Ni-koumma, tyni-æn ta ti Jesus, Ina, manga-mau-kow assi-appa irou-ato ta kidi ki tæ'e lei-au.
Ni-koumma, tyni-æn ta ti Jesus, Ina, manga-mau-kow assi-appa irou-ato ta kidi ki tæ'e lei-au.
S.TRANS: Jesus seyde tot hear Drouwe wat hebbde ick met u[te doen]: Mijne ure en is noch niet gekomen.
Jesus saith unto her, Woman, what have I to do with thee? mine hour is not yet come.
耶穌說：「母親，我與你有甚麼相干？我的時候還沒有到。」

S.FORM: Ni-kma ta Rarenan tyn ki pæ-iroung-in, Ka mamang ka pa-sousou-an-eih tyn ymmou-mi æn ahquâ-au-to.
Ni-kma ta Rarenan tyn ki pæ-iroung-in, Ka mamang ka pa-sousou-an-eih tyn ymmou-mi æn ahquâ-au-to.
S.TRANS: SÄ³ne moeder seyde tot de dienders So wat hy n-lieden sal seggen [dar] doet.
His mother saith unto the servants, Whatsoever he saith unto you, do it.
他母親對用人說：「他告訴你們甚麼，你們就做甚麼。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-attaqu-'an hynna ta va'ang a-vang ka ninnim ka na vahtou alei ka pou-raraloum-eih na kidi ki pakakoupti'-hen ki Joden, ka sasasat ki anna pou-koun dou rouha toutouro lava ki [sato ki keïrangen] ka Metreten.

Ka ni-attaqu-'an hynna ta va'ang avang ka ninnim ka na vahtou alei ka pou-raraloum-eih na kidi ki pakakoupti'-hen ki Joden, ka sasasat ki anna pou-koun dou rouha toutouro lava ki [sato ki keïrangen] ka Metreten.
S.TRANS: Ende aldaer waren fes sreennen water-baten ghesrelt na de reyniginghe der Joden elck houdende twee of drie metreten.
And there were set there six waterpots of stone, after the manner of the purifying of the Jews, containing two or three firkins apiece.
照猶太人潔淨的規矩，有六口石缸擺在那裏，每口可以盛兩三桶水。

S.FORM: Ni-k'mata ti Jesus neini-æn; Pasi-tmôei-ei ta vaang-ævang ka pou-raraloum-en ki raloum Ka ni-pouh-t'bbi-en'nein ta anna tou ngataf.
Ni-k'mata ti Jesus neini-æn; Pasi-tmôei-ei ta vaang-ævang ka pou-raraloum-en ki raloum Ka ni-pouh-t'bbi-en'nein ta anna tou ngataf.
S.TRANS: Jesus seyde tot haer; Dullet de water-baten met water. Ende sy buldense tot bobentoe.
Jesus saith unto them, Fill the waterpots with water. And they filled them up to the brim.
耶穌對用人說：「把缸倒滿了水。」他們就倒滿了，直到缸口。

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma neini-æn, 'H'ib-bauh nyn, ad-dau ki Si-bavau ki tallagh [ka Tama-pileileih,] ka ni-ad-din nein.
Ka ni-k'ma neini-æn, 'H'ib-bauh nyn, ad-dau ki Si-bavau ki tallagh [ka Tama-pileileih,] ka ni-ad-din nein.
S.TRANS: Ende hy seyde tot haer Schept nu ende draeght het tot den Nof-meester ende sy drogen-t.
And he saith unto them, Draw out now, and bear unto the governor of the feast. And they bare it.
耶穌又說：「現在可以舀出來，送給管筵席的。」他們就送了去。

S.FORM: Irou ka 'k-kahà 'k-dymman ta Si-bavau ki tallah ki raloum, ka ni-pahahala-'n ki karæum mæt-tæh, (ka assi tyn 'ou-mh-an ni-tæ'i-kouna [ta atta], ra 'ou-mh-an ki pæ-iroung-in ka ni-mæhgib ki ra-loum-da) anna ta ni-tætæm ki Si-bavau ki talah ta paræh ka væ-'æu.

Irou ka 'k-kahà 'k-dymman ta Si-bavau ki tallah ki raloum, ka ni-pahahala-'n ki karæum mæt-tæh, (ka assi tyn 'ou-mh-an ni-tæ'i-kouna [ta atta], ra 'ou-mh-an ki pæ-iroung-in ka ni-mæhgib ki ra-loum-da) anna ta ni-tætæm ki Si-bavau ki talah ta paræh ka væ-'æu.
S.TRANS: Als nu de Nof-meester het water dat wijn geworden was geproeft hadde (ende hy en wift niet ban waer [de wijn] was maer de dienaren die het water geschept hadden wisten het ) so riep de Nof-meesier den Bruydegom.
When the ruler of the feast had tasted the water that was made wine, and knew not whence it was: (but the servants which drew the water knew;) the governor of the feast called the bridegroom,
管筵席的嘗了那水變的酒，並不知道是哪裏來的，只有舀水的用人知道。管筵席的便叫新郎來，

S.FORM: Ka k'ma tyni-æn; Veiæh ka ka'euloung pi-ouro ki hala ki ka-ræum mættæh ka mariang, irou ka ni-mou-sangigh myt [pi-taæu-ta æuh] ki masaun assi mariang: [ra] ymhou, ni hma kow ki mariang tou kidi hnyn.
Ka k'ma tyni-æn; Veiæh ka ka'euloung pi-ouro ki hala ki ka-ræum mættæh ka mariang, irou ka ni-mou-sangigh myt [pi-taæu-ta æuh] ki masaun assi mariang: [ra] ymhou, ni hma kow ki mariang tou kidi hnyn.
S.TRANS: Ende seyde tot hem ; Ale man set eerst den goeden den wijt ioppy ende wanner men wel gedroncken heeft als dan den minderen: [maer] ghy hebt den goeden wijn tot nu toe bewaert.
And saith unto him, Every man at the beginning doth set forth good wine; and when men have well drunk, then that which is worse: but thou hast kept the good wine until now.
對他說：「人都是先擺上好酒，等客喝足了，才擺上次的，你倒把好酒留到如今！」

S.FORM: Naunamou katta ki pou-kidi-en ka 'ou-ryng-hau-en ta ni-pamt-ten ti Jesus tou Kana ka tou Galilea, ka nipæu-æmæh pou-pæ-næh ki keirang-en ki kidi tyn, ka ni-tna-msing tyni-æn ta Pahta-tæutæu' han tyn.
Naunamou katta ki pou-kidi-en ka 'ou-ryng-hau-en ta ni-pamt-ten ti Jesus tou Kana ka tou Galilea, ka nipæu-æmæh pou-pæ-næh ki keirang-en ki kidi tyn, ka ni-tna-msing tyni-æn ta Pahta-tæutæu' han tyn.
S.TRANS: Dit beginsel der teeckenen heeft Jesus ghedaen te Cana in Galileen ende heeft sijne Neerlijckhent gheopenbaert : ende sijne Disculpen ghelosden in hem.
This beginning of miracles did Jesus in Cana of Galilee, and manifested forth his glory; and his disciples believed on him.
這是耶穌所行的頭一件神蹟，是在加利利的迦拿行的，顯出他的榮耀來；他的門徒就信他了。

S.FORM: Si-ǣuh ki anna ni-mou-rapah ta teni mou-qua tou Kapernaum, Teni, ki Rarenan tyn, ki tæ'i-a-paparatyn, ki Pah-tatæutæu-han-appa tyn ka assi makka-dalia ki wæ'i ki pæyli-en nein hynna.
Si-ǣuh ki anna ni-mou-rapah ta teni mou-qua tou Kapernaum, Teni, ki Rarenan tyn, ki tæ'i-a-paparatyn, ki Pah-tatæutæu-han-appa tyn ka assi makka-dalia ki wæ'i ki pæyli-en nein hynna.
S.TRANS: Daer na gingh hy af nae Capernaum hy ende sijne moeder ende sijne broeders ende sijne Discipulen ende en bleben aldaer niet beele dagen.
After this he went down to Capernaum, he, and his mother, and his brethren, and his disciples: and they continued there not many days.
這事以後，耶穌與他的母親、弟兄，和門徒都下迦百農去，在那裏住了不多幾日。 （太21‧12－13；可11‧15－17；路19‧45－46）

S.FORM: Ka itou-tamang ta Ou-va-vatoug-han ki Hali-da æu-en [ka Pascha] ki Joden ni-mæbavau ta ti Jesus mou-qua tou Jerusalem.
Ka itou-tamang ta Ou-va-vatoug-han ki Hali-da æu-en [ka Pascha] ki Joden ni-mæbavau ta ti Jesus mou-qua tou Jerusalem.
S.TRANS: Ende het Pascha der Joden was nae hy ende Jefus gingh op nae Jerusalem.
And the Jews' passover was at hand, and Jesus went up to Jerusalem.
猶太人的逾越節近了，耶穌就上耶路撒冷去。

S.FORM: Ka ni-kabalei tyn tou Kou-va ki tatæm'd-en ki Alid ta pa-sa-darimma ki louang, kijou ko, ki padæuh, ki Tama-viri ki malitouk ka myrroung-ato hynna.
Ka ni-kabalei tyn tou Kou-va ki tatæm'd-en ki Alid ta pa-sa-darimma ki louang, kijou ko, ki padæuh, ki Tama-viri ki malitouk ka myrroung-ato hynna.
S.TRANS: Ende hy nondt in den Tempel die offen ende schapen ende dupben berkochten ende wisselaers [daer] sittende.
And found in the temple those that sold oxen and sheep and doves, and the changers of money sitting:
看見殿裏有賣牛、羊、鴿子的，並有兌換銀錢的人坐在那裏，

S.FORM: Ka rou ni-pei-ring-ei tyn ta pattou-bæuri-en ka taritarigh ni-pata 'æu-ym mid tyn ta neni pa-ou-tauwah, tou Kouva ki ta-tam'd-en ki Alid, ta jouko, ki lo-uang-appa: ka na sa-sbugh tyn ta malitouk, ki tama-viri ki malitouk, ka ni-pa pæ-æutoukkah tyn ta tpal-da.

Ka rou ni-pei-ring-ei tyn ta pattou-bæuri-en ka taritarigh ni-pata 'æu-ym mid tyn ta neni pa-ou-tauwah, tou Kouva ki ta-tam'd-en ki Alid, ta jouko, ki lo-uang-appa: ka na sa-sbugh tyn ta malitouk, ki tama-viri ki malitouk, ka ni-pa pæ-æutoukkah tyn ta tpal-da.
S.TRANS: Ende een geessel ban touwkens ghemaeckt hebbende dreef hyse alle uyt den Tempel oock de schapen ende de offen : ende het geldt der wisselaren stortede hy unt ende keerde de tafelen om.
And when he had made a scourge of small cords, he drove them all out of the temple, and the sheep, and the oxen; and poured out the changers' money, and overthrew the tables;
耶穌就拿繩子做成鞭子，把牛羊都趕出殿去，倒出兌換銀錢之人的銀錢，推翻他們的桌子，

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ki tama-pa-sa-dimma ki padæuh, Hami-au hia ta anna ; in'-ei pa-sau-kou-noun pa-pæ'æ myhkaula ki ta-lagh ki pæ'i-assen ta talagh ki Ra-ma-au.
Ka ni-k'ma ki tama-pa-sa-dimma ki padæuh, Hami-au hia ta anna ; in'-ei pa-sau-kou-noun pa-pæ'æ myhkaula ki ta-lagh ki pæ'i-assen ta talagh ki Rama-au.
S.TRANS: Ende hy seyde tot de gene die de duyben berkochten ; Neemt dese dingen ban hier wech : en maeckt niet het Nuys mijns Daders tot een huys ban koophandel.
And said unto them that sold doves, Take these things hence; make not my Father's house an house of merchandise.
又對賣鴿子的說：「把這些東西拿去！不要將我父的殿當作買賣的地方。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-hibalei-en ki Pah-tatæutæu-en tyn ki na sasoulat, Aruk ki talagh-oho ta ni-rmihal jau-an.
Ka ni-hibalei-en ki Pah-tatæutæu-en tyn ki na sasoulat, Aruk ki talagh-oho ta ni-rmihal jau-an.
S.TRANS: Ende sijne Discpulen wierden indachtich datter geschreben ig: Den yber uwes huys heeft my berslonden.
And his disciples remembered that it was written, The zeal of thine house hath eaten me up.
他的門徒就想起經上記着說：「我為你的殿心裏焦急，如同火燒。」

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-mattæ'i-vli ta Joden, ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn; Pou-kidi-en ki mang ta pa-k'ytta-en-hou ymi-æn-æn, ka komma-kow-hynna ki ring-ei?
Anna ta ni-mattæ'i-vli ta Joden, ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn; Pou-kidi-en ki mang ta pa-k'ytta-en-hou ymi-æn-æn, ka komma-kow-hynna ki ring-ei?
S.TRANS: De Joden antwoorden dan ende seyden tot hem: Wat teecken toont ghy ons dat gel dese dingen doet?
Then answered the Jews and said unto him, What sign shewest thou unto us, seeing that thou doest these things?
因此猶太人問他說：「你既做這些事，還顯甚麼神蹟給我們看呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ti Jesus ka ni-k'ma neini-æn: K'tt-'au ta Tal-lagh K'atta ka pa-likough-au-mau pæ-æh-pit ta anna tou kidi kitou-touro ki wæ'i.
Ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ti Jesus ka ni-k'ma neini-æn: K'tt-'au ta Tallagh K'atta ka pa-likough-au-mau pæ-æh-pit ta anna tou kidi kitou-touro ki wæ'i.
S.TRANS: Jesus antwoordeende seyde tot haer : Breket desen Tempel ende Ã­n drie dagen salick den selben op-rech ten.
Jesus answered and said unto them, Destroy this temple, and in three days I will raise it up.
耶穌回答說：「你們拆毀這殿，我三日內要再建立起來。」

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-k'ma ta Joden, Makk'ahpat kytti-æn'æb ki num ki tauwil ni-pei-ring-ei-en ta kouva k'atta ki tatamd-en ki Alid, ka ymhou pæ-likoh-au-'mhou kaua pæ-æhpit ta anna [tou kidi ki] toutou ro ki wæ'i.

Anna ta ni-k'ma ta Joden, Makk'ahpat kytti-æn'æb ki num ki tauwil ni-pei-ring-ei-en ta kouva k'atta ki tatamd-en ki Alid, ka ymhou pæ-likoh-au-'mhou kaua pæ-æhpit ta anna [tou kidi ki] toutou ro ki wæ'i.
S.TRANS: De Joden seyben danSes-en-beertigh jaeren is [over] desen Tempel ghebouwt ende ghy fult ghy dien in drie daghen op-rechten?
Then said the Jews, Forty and six years was this temple in building, and wilt thou rear it up in three days?
猶太人便說：「這殿是四十六年才造成的，你三日內就再建立起來嗎？」

S.FORM: Ra ni-pa-sou sou-en tyn ta Tallagh ki voual tyn.
Ra ni-pa-sou sou-en tyn ta Tallagh ki voual tyn.
S.TRANS: Maer hy seyde [dit] ban den Tempel sijns lichaems.
But he spake of the temple of his body.
但耶穌這話是以他的身體為殿。

S.FORM: Alei ki anna, rou ni-æh-kaha ta teni æhpit ki ni-kapatei-an, ni-hi-balei ki Pahta tæutæu-entyn, ka ni-pa-sou sou-en tyn neini-æn ta atta: ka ni-tnà-'msing ki Na-Sasoulat ki na sou appa ka ni-pa-sousou-en ti Jesus.

Alei ki anna, rou ni-æh-kaha ta teni æhpit ki ni-kapatei-an, ni-hi-balei ki Pahta tæutæu-entyn, ka ni-pa-sou sou-en tyn neini-æn ta atta: ka ni-tnà-'msing ki Na-Sasoulat ki na sou appa ka ni-pa-sousou-en ti Jesus.
S.TRANS: Daerom als hy opgestaen was ban den dooden wierden sijne Discipulen gedachtig dat hy dit tot haer geseght hadde:ende sy geloofdenden de Shrift ende het woord dat Jesus gesproken hadde.
When therefore he was risen from the dead, his disciples remembered that he had said this unto them; and they believed the scripture, and the word which Jesus had said.
所以到他從死裏復活以後，門徒就想起他說過這話，便信了聖經和耶穌所說的。

S.FORM: Irou ka æ'ià-qua ta teni tou Jerusalem, tou Hali-da'eu-en ka Ouvavatoug-han, mabatoung ta ni-tna-'msing ki Nanang tyn, rou k'ak'yt-tan nein ta p'ou-kidi-en tyn ka ni-pei-ring-ei-tyn da.
Irou ka æ'ià-qua ta teni tou Jerusalem, tou Hali-da'eu-en ka Ouvavatoug-han, mabatoung ta ni-tna-'msing ki Nanang tyn, rou k'ak'yt-tan nein ta p'ou-kidi-en tyn ka ni-pei-ring-ei-tyn da.
S.TRANS: Ende als hy te Jerusalem was op het Paschain het Feest gheloofden beele in sijen Name siende sijne teeckenen die hy dede.
Now when he was in Jerusalem at the passover, in the feast day, many believed in his name, when they saw the miracles which he did.
當耶穌在耶路撒冷過逾越節的時候，有許多人看見他所行的神蹟，就信了他的名。

S.FORM: Ra ni-mæ-eyes tyni-æn mamado neini-æn ta ti Jesus, alei ka k'-ymd-en tyn kmalang neini-æn.
Ra ni-mæ-eyes tyni-æn mamado neini-æn ta ti Jesus, alei ka k'-ymd-en tyn kmalang neini-æn.
S.TRANS: Maer Jesus selbe betrouwde haer hem selben niet om dat hy'fe alle liende.
But Jesus did not commit himself unto them, because he knew all men,
耶穌卻不將自己交託他們；因為他知道萬人，

S.FORM: Alei-appa ka assi mǣ-i-ǣǣ-po ta teni ka gmeil-ah ta tim-a-mang ki kaeulong, ka ou-madou-en tyn mou-mha ta mamang ka i-tou-rbo ki kæ'euloung.
Alei-appa ka assi mǣ-i-ǣǣ-po ta teni ka gmeil-ah ta tima-mang ki kaeulong, ka ou-madou-en tyn mou-mha ta mamang ka i-tou-rbo ki kæ'euloung.
S.TRANS: Ende dat hy niet ban noden en hadde dat yemant ghetuyghen soude ban den mensche want hy selbe wist wat in den mensche was.
And needed not that any should testify of man: for he knew what was in man.
也用不着誰見證人怎樣，因他知道人心裏所存的。
